description_long: This object is a historical-style cannon mounted on a wooden wheeled carriage. The cannon barrel is made of dark, weathered metal with visible rust and patina, featuring reinforcing rings and a flared muzzle. The carriage is constructed from heavy, dark-stained wood, reinforced with metal brackets and bolts, and sits on four solid wooden wheels with metal rims. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with the cannon barrel secured to the carriage by side trunnions. The surface of both the barrel and carriage shows signs of age and use, with rough textures and worn paint. This type of vehicle would have been used for combat, typically in historical or reenactment urban settings.
description: A weathered metal cannon mounted on a dark wooden wheeled carriage, featuring rusted textures and robust construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the cannon and the symmetrical arrangement of the carriage and wheels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the cannon barrel, the trunnions, and the rectangular wooden carriage with two visible wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carriage, the breech of the cannon, and the alignment of the wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other side of the cannon and carriage with matching details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One fixed cannon barrel mounted centrally on the wooden carriage.
attribute_armor_plating: None visible; the vehicle consists of exposed metal and wood with no additional armor plating.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; the object is finished in solid dark brown and black with rusted areas.
